inputs.label: Total Authorized Shares
inputs.businessContext: The maximum number of shares the company is authorized to issue.

businessContext_i18n.en: The maximum number of shares the company is authorized to issue.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şirketin ihraç etmesine izin verilen maksimum hisse sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die maximale Anzahl von Aktien, die das Unternehmen ausgeben darf.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre maximal d'actions que la société est autorisée à émettre.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número máximo de acciones que la empresa está autorizada a emitir.

inputs.label: Shares Outstanding
inputs.businessContext: Current number of shares held by all shareholders before new investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current number of shares held by all shareholders before new investment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeni yatırımdan önce tüm hissedarların elinde bulunan mevcut hisse sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle Anzahl der von allen Aktionären gehaltenen Aktien vor der neuen Investition.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre actuel d'actions détenues par tous les actionnaires avant un nouvel investissement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número actual de acciones en manos de todos los accionistas antes de nueva inversión.

inputs.label: Option Pool Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of shares reserved for employee stock options.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of shares reserved for employee stock options.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışan hisse senedi opsiyonları için ayrılan hisse sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der für Mitarbeiteraktienoptionen reservierten Aktien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'actions réservées pour les options d'achat d'actions des employés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de acciones reservadas para opciones sobre acciones de empleados.

inputs.label: New Investment Amount
inputs.businessContext: Amount of money being invested in the company.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount of money being invested in the company.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geldbetrag, der in das Unternehmen investiert wird.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de dinero invertida en la empresa.

inputs.label: Pre-Money Valuation
inputs.businessContext: Valuation of the company prior to the new investment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Valuation of the company prior to the new investment.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bewertung des Unternehmens vor der neuen Investition.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valorisation de l'entreprise avant le nouvel investissement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valoración de la empresa antes de la nueva inversión.
